mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted_yn = 'N') AS USERCOUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE deleted_yn = 'N') AS VIDEOCOUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS PENDINGREPORTCOUNT FROM DUAL

SELECT r.id AS ID, r.reporter_id AS REPORTERID, u1.username AS REPORTERNAME, r.target_type AS TARGETTYPE, r.target_id AS TARGETID, r.reason AS REASON, r.status AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATEDAT, NVL(v.title, 'N/A') AS TARGETTITLE, NVL(u2.username, 'N/A') AS TARGETOWNERNAME FROM reports r JOIN users u1 ON r.reporter_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN videos v ON (r.target_id = v.id AND r.target_type = 'VIDEO') LEFT JOIN users u2 ON v.user_id = u2.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
